description: Aggregate multiple AI assistants in Obsidian, switch and access with one click. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: liwbcraft

manifest.name: AI Hub Manager

name: AI Hub Manager

releases.author: liwbcraft
releases.description:
# Release v1.0.1

## 中文

### 🎉 首次发布

AI Hub Manager - 在 Obsidian 中一站式访问 20+ AI 助手

**主要功能**
- 内置 ChatGPT、DeepSeek、通义千问、Kimi、豆包、文心一言、Gemini 等 20+ AI
- 顶部标签栏快速切换，支持拖拽滚动
- 自动识别可嵌入网站，无法嵌入的转为弹窗打开
- 自由添加/删除/编辑 AI，拖拽调整顺序
- 支持中文/英文双语

**安装**
- Obsidian 社区插件市场搜索 "AI Hub"
- 或下载 `main.js`、`styles.css`、`manifest.json` 放入 `.obsidian/plugins/ai-hub/`

---

## English

### 🎉 First Release

AI Hub Manager - Access 20+ AI assistants in Obsidian

**Features**
- Built-in ChatGPT, DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi, Doubao, Ernie, Gemini, and 20+ more
- Quick tab switching with drag-to-scroll
- Auto-detect embeddable sites, fallback to popup
- Add/delete/edit AI models, drag to reorder
- Chinese/English bilingual support

**Installation**
- Search "AI Hub" in Obsidian community plugins
- Or download `main.js`, `styles.css`, `manifest.json` to `.obsidian/plugins/ai-hub/`
releases.name: AI Hub v1.0.1
